response.justification: Sarah is an accomplished full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience and recent staff-level involvement in AI infrastructure, but lacks the core AI/ML competencies required for this forward-deployed GenAI role. Her professional background shows no demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM-based system delivery. While her current role involves MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, there is insufficient evidence of production GenAI solution development to meet the minimum 8-year requirement for building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
strengths: 20 years of proven software engineering expertise with recent staff-level role at re:cinq involving AI infrastructure and agentic workflows
Strong TypeScript and Node.js foundation across multiple domains; demonstrated ability to architect scalable systems handling millions of requests
Clear track record of technical mentorship and communication through workshops, talks, and open-source projects including testing frameworks and GIS platforms
concerns: No Python expertise despite being a core required language; entire professional career focused on TypeScript/Node.js with no evidence of flexibility toward Python
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)—essential for the role
Insufficient production GenAI delivery background; recent AI infrastructure work (1 year) does not satisfy the 8+ years requirement for building and shipping production-grade AI solutions

key_factors.factor: No Python or GenAI-specific technical skills
